data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Shipping if not pickup', but the evidence does not confirm that shipping is implemented correctly when the customer opts for it instead of pickup. While the use case describes the shipping process, there is no concrete evidence from API reads or persisted state checks that explicitly demonstrates this functionality. The lack of evidence regarding the shipping mechanism leads to a clear gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of shipping when the customer chooses not to pick up the product.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
